entity.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange whose former official domain now resolves to a domain-sale page. HEI classifies CITEX as inactive rather than dead because no reviewed terminal shutdown notice was recovered.
entity.notes: Candidate registry material identifies the exchange, while the former domain is now parked for sale. No terminal date or shutdown notice is asserted.

evidence.title: CITEX exchange registry entry
evidence.notes: Registry source identifies CITEX as an exchange candidate.

evidence.title: CITEX historical domain archive
evidence.notes: Historical domain record used with the current observation that citex.io redirects to a domain-sale page.
